name: ijp-hr-cms-manager
description: IJP HR CMS Manager - internal dashboard for managing a single Webflow CMS Job Postings collection

scripts.dev: concurrently -n shared,server,client -c yellow,green,blue "npm run dev -w shared" "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client
scripts.build:server: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w server
scripts.build:client: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w client
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w server && npm run lint -w client
